ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider (e.g., AT&T, Verizon) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the provider */,
  "support_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for provider support */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the provider's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., Phone, Tablet, Laptop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (e.g., 4G, 5G, WiFi) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network */,
  "frequency_band" TEXT /* Frequency band used by the network */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Technology used by the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the performance data was collected */,
  "wRttAvg" REAL /* Average round-trip time (RTT) in milliseconds */,
  "wTCPUp" REAL /* Average TCP upload speed in Mbps */,
  "wTCPDown" REAL /* Average TCP download speed in Mbps */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate in percentage */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Jitter in milliseconds */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency in milliseconds */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the performance data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the user works */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_settings" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high RTT, low TCP speed) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_detail" TEXT /* Additional details for the notification (e.g., email address, phone number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_history" (
  "alert_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert history record */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert setting */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance data that triggered the alert */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alert_settings ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., network engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "default_permission" TEXT /* Default permission level for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view performance data, edit alert settings) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON format */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_settings" (
  "report_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report setting */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., report frequency, report format) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report setting was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the report setting was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., router, switch) */,
  "node_description" TEXT /* Description of the node */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the node (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "link_name" TEXT /* Name of the link */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., wired, wireless) */,
  "link_description" TEXT /* Description of the link */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth of the link in Mbps */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the link (e.g., active, down) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_topology" (
  "topology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topology */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node */,
  "link_id" INTEGER /* ID of the link */,
  "topology_description" TEXT /* Description of the topology */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the topology (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topology_id")
)
